name: efficient-lm-finetuning
description: Fine-tune large LMs efficiently using LoRA, prefixes, and adapters updating tiny weight fractions.
paperTitle: Efficient Fine-tuning Strategies for Language Models
keywords: fine-tuning, language models, efficiency, low-rank, adapter, parameter efficiency
content:
## Efficient Fine-tuning Strategies for Language Models

LM fine-tuning doesn't require updating all weights. Low-rank updates achieve full performance.

### Core Concept

LM fine-tuning doesn't require updating all weights. Low-rank updates achieve full performance. This enables efficient model development and deployment.
